$Comment: Simple owner-follow behavior: seek while close, teleport back when outside follow range.

MasterTargetSlot.Description: Target slot used to track the owner/master.

FollowLockOnRange.Description: Range used to keep the owner target locked while following.

FollowSeekRange.Description: Distance threshold where seek is used; beyond this distance, teleport fallback is used.

FollowSeekSlowDownDistance.Description: How far from the master to start slowing down when seeking.

FollowSeekStopDistance.Description: How far from the master to stop when seeking.

FollowSeekRelativeSpeed.Description: Relative speed used when seeking the master.

Instructions.$Comment: Seek when the owner is within follow range.
Fallback to teleport when owner target exists but is outside seek range.
